text:
"Trust" is a song from the film Evangelion: 3.0 You Can (Not) Redo. It is track 9 in the album Music from Evangelion: 3.0 You Can (Not) Redo, disc 1. https://vgmdb.net/album/35707 

Lyrics

 
Learn to trust,
If you must,
Learn to love,
Then learn to trust.

Turn your back,
Close your eyes,
Open minds will
Learn to trust.

And be trusted so the guardian of
All that is secure and precious is you.
